---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about-block
  image: "" # personal image here
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/zvkong
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/zewei-kong-229b951ab
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:kongz@missouri.edu"
---

::: {#about-block}
:::

# Welcome to My Website
I am Zewei Kong, a Ph.D. candidate at the University of Missouri specializing in Bayesian methodology. My current research involves developing novel Bayesian hierarchical frameworks to jointly model multi-type survey data for small area estimation. Alongside a strong theoretical foundation, I am highly proficient in R and Python for full-stack data processing and visualization. 

I am also interested in the intersection of traditional statistics, Machine Learning, and AI. A recent highlight is TraffIQ, an RShiny web app I developed that translates complex spatial statistical outputs into intuitive safety insights via an AI backend and a user-friendly UI/UX design built from scratch.

Interested in Bayesian modeling, Machine Learning, or data analytics? Please feel free to [contact me](mailto:kongz@missouri.edu).

```{=html}
<div  style="margin: 30px; text-align: center;">
<a class="btn btn-primary" href="cv/index.qmd" role="button" style="padding: 15px 30px;">View My CV</a>
</div>
---
